---
description: "Repository instructions for agent-behavior."
---
# Agent Behavior Rules

## Before coding
- Read .github/instructions/architecture.instructions.md
- Read .github/instructions/engineering-guidelines.instructions.md
- Read .github/instructions/feature-development.instructions.md

## Development mindset
- Prefer simplicity
- Avoid overengineering
- Focus on working solution

## Code generation
- Only generate what is necessary
- Do not anticipate future features
- Do not create unused classes

## Decision making
When unsure:
- Choose simplest approach
- Prefer readability over cleverness
